content: When Anti-Mage is low on health, use Blink to escape to safety. Position yourself near your team or under a tower to maximize your survivability.
Pudge's hook is most effective when enemies are out of position. Wait for key targets to walk into hook range, then land the hook to catch them off-guard and start a teamfight.
Crystal Maiden's aura provides mana regeneration to all nearby allies. Stay close to your teammates to maximize mana efficiency and allow your carry to farm more efficiently.
Anti-Mage scales extremely well into the late game. Focus on farming efficiently in the early and mid game to reach your damage threshold faster and dominate fights.
Pudge's ultimate Dismember can be used to secure kills or shut down enemies during teamfights. Prioritize securing high-value targets to maximize the impact of your team.
